violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Discovered a rack with several trays of baked food that was not covered and had been exposed and not protected since the previous day. Food items must be protected at all times.--Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. -Unknown tubs of food product in the left side of the shared 3-door refrigerator. Unknown food, not dated, not identified if it was for personal use or customers. Label accordingly and date.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --found 2 gallons of milk that will expire on that day. Make sure dairy products are used prior to expiration date.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. -Unknown tubs of food product in the left side of the shared 3-door refrigerator. Unknown food, not dated, not identified if it was for personal use or customers. Label accordingly and date.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Generalized food residue on multiple locations. Improve frequency of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Space had multiple locations of flour residue built up in various locations.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
